Title: Stabilize gate behavior in stable regimes

Description:
Currently, gate entropy remains high even in stable regimes.

Goal:
Encourage lower entropy during stable phases while keeping flexibility during transitions.

Ideas:
- Conditional entropy penalty
- Delta-based gating regularization

Looking for:
- Simple implementation experiments
- Visualization of entropy vs regime phase
